title: TARDIS Refined
description: Adds the Doctor Who TARDIS to your game!
body:
![Tardis Refined Logo](https://i.imgur.com/eIfAaYJ.png)

This mod adds the TARDIS from the BBC Television show "DOCTOR WHO", which acts as a portable dimension that players can occupy. Grow and advance your TARDIS to your liking with full customization options, allowing players to emulate their favorite parts of the show.  The mod aims to emulate the Vanilla playstyle, ensuring that it matches within the established gameplay rules of Minecraft.

![The Default Shell](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/34910888/209619086-39fc1d0a-f5cc-4b49-aa61-5cd4bb3b532a.png)

## Features:
* Travel anywhere, across dimensions and across the world!
* Fully modelled Exterior Shells and Console Units
* Fully functional controls - allowing you to travel anywhere!
* Locking system.
* Customization of the Exterior Shell, Desktop and Console Unit

## Issues
Please report any issues to the issue tracker linked on the left of this page.

## Distribution
You are free to use this mod for personal use.
You may use it for non-commercial public use as well, as long as you link back to this CurseForge/Modrinth page and use official download links.
You may not reupload this mod on other platforms.
These terms can be subject to change.

## Modpacks
You can use this mod in your modpack. You don’t have to ask for permission as long as you credit the author.
It would be greatly appreciated if you included this mod in your modpack's "Dependencies" list. 
If you wish to put this mod in a modpack that is redistributed commercially, please contact the owner about it so we can discuss this further.
These terms can be subject to change. 

You can view our license here. All terms of this license are subject to change.
